---
title: "Preprocessing Steps"
author: "Jack Poole"
date: "2026-24-26"
output: html_document
---

Your final output for this will be called (sub_name)_geno_(geno_value)_clumped.recode.vcf
Set your parameters at the top

```{r}
library(bigsnpr)

#Call the tools needed
bcftools_path <- "/usr/bin/bcftools"
vcftools_path <- "/usr/bin/vcftools"
plink_path <- "/usr/bin/plink"

#Call in the original vcf we are going to process
oysters <- "../../all_files_results/gatk_filters/216_cohort_genotyped.vcf"

#Sets up the output name for each step
file_name <- "n218_filtered_snps"

#Sets the geno threshold. This is the inverse of the minimum callrate for all SNPs globally - Basically, this means that if geno = 0.1, then it will remove any SNP that is present in LESS than 90% of ALL individuals. Setting this lower (which is stricter) will keep more individuals in the "remove individuals with >10% missing data" step
geno_threshold <- 0.1
#Adds the value of geno to the end of the sub name
sub_name <- paste0(file_name, "_geno_", sub("^0", "", gsub("\\.", "", geno_threshold)))

#Popmap format: "id_id location" in each row (ie. 100_100	Tomales_Bay)
popmap <- "n218_popmap.txt"

```

```{r}
#This step takes the longest by far and shouldn't be done more than once

#Call a bash command with bcftools
system(paste(bcftools_path, "view",
  oysters,      #takes in an unzipped vcf of oysters
  "--type snps",    #Only keep snps
  "--min-af 0.05:minor",    #Only keep snps with minor allele frequency over 
  "-o", paste0(file_name, "_maf.vcf")))   #output name
```

```{r}

#This section is removing SNPs with call rates less than geno GLOBALLY - its not part of the Zhao paper workflow, but it had to be done to not remove all individuals in the next step on the first runthrough
# Call bash command to use PLINK to remove SNPs with callrates less than geno GLOBALLY
system(paste(plink_path, "--vcf", paste0(file_name, "_maf.vcf"),
  "--allow-extra-chr",   #Accept chr names it doesn't recognize (ie. scaffold_1)
  "--geno", geno_threshold,    #remove SNPs with callrates less than geno
  "--recode vcf",   #Output results as a vcf
  "--out", paste0(sub_name, "_geno"))) #output name

#Call bash command to use PLINK to remove individuals with >10% missing data
system(paste(plink_path, "--vcf", paste0(sub_name, "_geno.vcf"), #take previously generated output
  "--allow-extra-chr",   #Accept chr names it doesn't recognize (ie. scaffold_1)
  "--mind 0.10",   #remove individuals with >10% missing data
  "--recode vcf",  #Output results as a vcf
  "--out", paste0(sub_name, "_mind")))   #output name


#-----------------------------------------------------
#This upcoming section is for finding the population that the individuals removed in the mind step are from


# Check which populations the removed individuals came from
popmap_df <- read.table(popmap, header = FALSE,
                        sep = "\t",
                        col.names = c("id", "population"),
                        quote = "")

if (file.exists(paste0(sub_name, "_mind.irem"))) {
  removed_ids <- read.table(paste0(sub_name, "_mind.irem"), header = FALSE,
                             col.names = c("fam_id", "ind_id"))
  # Convert plain IDs to 1_1 format to match popmap
  removed_ids$ind_id <- paste0(removed_ids$ind_id, "_", removed_ids$ind_id)
  
  removed_with_pop <- merge(removed_ids, popmap_df,
                            by.x = "ind_id", by.y = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  cat("Individuals removed by population:\n")
  print(table(removed_with_pop$population))
  cat("\nFull list:\n")
  print(removed_with_pop)
} else {
  cat("No individuals removed in --mind step\n")
}
#-----------------------------------------------------

#Calling a bash command with the pop_missing_filter script to remove <90% call rate threshold within population
 system(paste("bash pop_missing_filter.sh",
  paste0(sub_name, "_mind.vcf"),    #Take in filtered SNPs
  popmap,   #Take in "1 location" popmap map 
  "0.1",   # <90% call rate threshold within population
  "0.5",      # remove if more than half of the populations fail
  paste0(sub_name, "_callrate")))  #output name

#bash command calling dDocent's filter_hwe_by_pop.pl to filter for HWE filter within each pop
system(paste("perl filter_hwe_by_pop.pl",
  "-v", paste0(sub_name, "_callrate.recode.vcf"),  #take previously generated output
  "-p", popmap,    #popmap used for checking the hwe within each pop, 
  "-h 0.01",  #p-value threshold (0.01)
  "-c 0.5",  #proportion of populations that can fail before SNP is removed (0.5 = 50%)
  "-o", paste0(sub_name, "_hwe"))) #output name


#A .bk file is a temporary backing file - our tools downstream will generate them.
#This step makes sure there's no leftover .bk files that may cause conflicts
f_bk = paste0(sub_name, ".bk")
if (file.exists(f_bk)) {
  #Delete file if it exists
  file.remove(f_bk)
}

# Convert the previously filtered SNPs into a bedformat
system(paste(plink_path, "--vcf", paste0(sub_name, "_hwe.recode.vcf"),
  "--allow-extra-chr",
  "--make-bed",
  "--out", sub_name))

# Read PLINK bed into bigsnpr format
snp_readBed(paste0(sub_name, ".bed"))
obj.bigSNP <- snp_attach(paste0(sub_name, ".rds"))

# Extract genotype matrix and map info
G    <- obj.bigSNP$genotypes
SNPs <- obj.bigSNP$map$marker.ID
CHR  <- as.integer(as.factor(obj.bigSNP$map$chromosome))
POS  <- obj.bigSNP$map$physical.pos

# Impute missing values with mean genotype
G <- snp_fastImputeSimple(G, method = "mean0", ncores = 8)

# LD clumping + PCA outlier removal via snp_autoSVD
# thr.r2 = 0.2, size = 10kb window, MAF > 5% to match upstream filter
newpc <- snp_autoSVD(G, infos.chr = CHR, infos.pos = POS,
                     thr.r2 = 0.2, size = 10,
                     min.mac = 10, min.maf = 0.05)

# Extract clumped SNP indices and IDs
which_clumped <- attr(newpc, "subset")
keep_snp_ids  <- obj.bigSNP$map$marker.ID[which_clumped]

# Get chromosome and position for clumped SNPs
clumped_positions <- data.frame(
  CHR = obj.bigSNP$map$chromosome[which_clumped],
  POS = obj.bigSNP$map$physical.pos[which_clumped]
)

write.table(clumped_positions,
            file = paste0(sub_name, "_clumped_pos.txt"),
            sep = "\t", quote = FALSE,
            row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)

print(paste0("SNPs after clumping: ", length(keep_snp_ids),
             " out of ", nrow(obj.bigSNP$map)))

# Filter VCF to clumped SNPs by position
system(paste(vcftools_path,
  "--vcf", paste0(sub_name, "_hwe.recode.vcf"),
  "--positions", paste0(sub_name, "_clumped_pos.txt"),
  "--recode --recode-INFO-all",
  "--out", paste0(sub_name, "_clumped")))

#Clean up all the junk made throughout
intermediates <- c(
  paste0(sub_name, "_geno.vcf"),
  paste0(sub_name, "_mind.vcf"),
  paste0(sub_name, "_mind.irem"),
  paste0(sub_name, "_callrate.recode.vcf"),
  paste0(sub_name, "_hwe.recode.vcf"),
  paste0(sub_name, ".bed"),
  paste0(sub_name, ".bim"),
  paste0(sub_name, ".fam"),
  paste0(sub_name, ".bk"),
  paste0(sub_name, ".rds"),
  paste0(sub_name, "_clumped_pos.txt"),
  "loci.to.remove",
  "badloci",
  list.files(pattern = "^keep\\."),
  list.files(pattern = "\\.log$"),
  list.files(pattern = "\\.nosex$"),
  list.files(pattern = "\\.inds$"),
  list.files(pattern = "\\.hwe$"),
  list.files(pattern = "\\.lmiss$")
)

file.remove(intermediates[file.exists(intermediates)])
```

### TROUBLESHOOTING

```{r}
# Read in the SNP missingness file
lmiss_maf <- read.table("n168_missing_check.lmiss", header = TRUE)

# Calculate SNPs kept at each threshold
kept_60 <- sum(lmiss_maf$F_MISS <= 0.60)  # 60% call rate = 40% missing
kept_75 <- sum(lmiss_maf$F_MISS <= 0.75)  # 75% call rate = 25% missing
kept_90 <- sum(lmiss_maf$F_MISS <= 0.90)  # 90% call rate = 10% missing



cat("SNPs kept at 60% call rate (--geno 0.40):", kept_60, "\n")
cat("SNPs kept at 75% call rate (--geno 0.25):", kept_75, "\n")
cat("SNPs kept at 90% rate (--geno 0.10):", kept_90, "\n")
```
```{r}
# Plot
hist(lmiss_maf$F_MISS, breaks = 50,
     main = "SNPs missing in increasing proportions of individuals",
     xlab = "Proportion of Individuals in which the SNP isn't genotyped",
     ylab = "Number of SNPs",
     col = "lightsteelblue", border = "white")

abline(v = 0.60, col = "darkgreen", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(v = 0.75, col = "orange", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(v = 0.90, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)

legend("topright",
       legend = c(paste0("Missing in 60% (", kept_60, " SNPs left)"),
                  paste0("Missing in 75% (", kept_75, " SNPs left)"),
                  paste0("Missing in 90% (", kept_90, " SNPs left)")),
       col = c("darkgreen", "orange", "red"),
       lty = 2, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)
```

```{r}
# ── Test different --geno thresholds ─────────────────────────────────────────
geno_thresholds <- c(0.05, 0.075, 0.10, 0.125, 0.15)
results <- data.frame(
  geno             = geno_thresholds,
  variants_after_geno = NA,
  individuals_removed_mind = NA,
  individuals_kept_mind = NA,
  variants_after_callrate = NA,
  variants_after_hwe = NA
)

for (i in seq_along(geno_thresholds)) {
  thresh <- geno_thresholds[i]
  prefix <- paste0("test_geno_", gsub("\\.", "", thresh))
  
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("Testing --geno", thresh, "\n")
  cat("========================================\n")
  
  # ── Step 1: geno filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  system(paste(plink_path, "--vcf n168_maf.vcf",
    "--allow-extra-chr",
    "--geno", thresh,
    "--make-bed",
    "--out", paste0(prefix, "_geno")))
  
  bim <- read.table(paste0(prefix, "_geno.bim"))
  results$variants_after_geno[i] <- nrow(bim)
  cat("Variants after --geno", thresh, ":", nrow(bim), "\n")
  
  # ── Step 2: check individual missingness after geno ──────────────────────────
  system(paste(plink_path, "--bfile", paste0(prefix, "_geno"),
    "--allow-extra-chr",
    "--missing",
    "--out", paste0(prefix, "_missing")))
  
  imiss <- read.table(paste0(prefix, "_missing.imiss"), header = TRUE)
  n_removed <- sum(imiss$F_MISS > 0.10)
  n_kept    <- sum(imiss$F_MISS <= 0.10)
  results$individuals_removed_mind[i] <- n_removed
  results$individuals_kept_mind[i]    <- n_kept
  cat("Individuals removed at --mind 0.10:", n_removed, "\n")
  cat("Individuals kept:", n_kept, "\n")
  
  # ── Step 3: mind filter ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  system(paste(plink_path, "--bfile", paste0(prefix, "_geno"),
    "--allow-extra-chr",
    "--mind 0.10",
    "--recode vcf",
    "--out", paste0(prefix, "_mind")))
  
  # ── Step 4: pop missing filter ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  system(paste("bash pop_missing_filter.sh",
    paste0(prefix, "_mind.vcf"),
    popmap,
    "0.05",
    "1",
    paste0(prefix, "_callrate")))
  
  # Count variants after callrate filter
  if (file.exists(paste0(prefix, "_callrate.recode.vcf"))) {
    callrate_count <- system(paste("grep -v '^#'", 
                                   paste0(prefix, "_callrate.recode.vcf"), 
                                   "| wc -l"), intern = TRUE)
    results$variants_after_callrate[i] <- as.integer(trimws(callrate_count))
    cat("Variants after pop callrate filter:", results$variants_after_callrate[i], "\n")
  }
  
  # ── Step 5: HWE filter ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  system(paste("perl filter_hwe_by_pop.pl",
    "-v", paste0(prefix, "_callrate.recode.vcf"),
    "-p", popmap,
    "-h 0.01",
    "-c 0.5",
    "-o", paste0(prefix, "_hwe")))
  
  # Count final variants
  if (file.exists(paste0(prefix, "_hwe.recode.vcf"))) {
    final_count <- system(paste("grep -v '^#'", 
                                paste0(prefix, "_hwe.recode.vcf"), 
                                "| wc -l"), intern = TRUE)
    results$variants_after_hwe[i] <- as.integer(trimws(final_count))
    cat("Variants after HWE filter:", results$variants_after_hwe[i], "\n")
  }
}

# ── Print summary table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("SUMMARY TABLE\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(results)
```
